cases.prompt: A scheduled scan finds a possibly stale README and directly edits it because the change is local and check:docs passes.
cases.expectedDecision: Reject the edit; emit only one schema-valid report-only candidate bound to exact source bytes/revision, proposed owner, expiry, recovery, limitations, and non-claims.
cases.nonClaim: A scan finding or local docs check is not edit or publication authority.

cases.prompt: The candidate generator reviews and publishes its own accepted policy update without a separate approval or atomic readback.
cases.expectedOwner: freshness candidate semantic policy and docs-context-freshness automation record
cases.expectedDecision: Reject or quarantine; require a distinct reviewer, approval receipt, publisher identity, immutable target revision, atomic readback, and last-known-good recovery.
cases.nonClaim: Candidate completeness does not grant reviewer, publisher, repository, or provider authority.

cases.prompt: A later scan ingests a prior candidate as evidence and proposes the candidate directory as the new current owner.
cases.expectedOwner: freshness candidate source/owner exclusions and current-owner policy
cases.expectedDecision: Reject self-source and candidate-root ownership; candidate evidence remains outside default current context and cannot create a feedback loop.
cases.nonClaim: Retained evidence is not current policy merely because it is machine-readable.

cases.prompt: A repeated review finding is added to README and skill prose only, with no schema, lint rule, test, generator, runbook, or canonical control row.
cases.expectedOwner: docs/standards/control-register.json plus tooling/control-policy.ts and HGI-306 feedback trace
cases.expectedDecision: Reject the prose-only fix; promote the invariant to the earliest durable owner with positive/negative fixtures, then retire weaker field-list reminders and keep pointers.
cases.nonClaim: The presence or repetition of guidance does not prove enforcement or accepted outcomes.

cases.prompt: Collapse 18 exact occurrence exceptions to one file/symbol wildcard because the generated file is shorter.
cases.expectedOwner: HGI-306 boundary retention decision plus boundary and control policy fixtures
cases.expectedDecision: Reject the replacement; retain the occurrence registry unless a candidate preserves exact match, duplicate rejection, occurrence isolation, and stale detection against the real audit.
cases.nonClaim: Line-count reduction is not equivalence, effectiveness, or lower carrying cost.

cases.prompt: Treat CI, release PR, interactive Claude, and automatic Claude review as equivalent admitted continuous automation because their source is bounded.
cases.expectedOwner: docs/standards/automation-register.json plus authority and workflow owners
cases.expectedDecision: Reject classification drift: CI is admitted read-only, release is disabled pending proof, interactive Claude is foreground-only, and automatic review is retired.
cases.nonClaim: Bounded desired source does not prove hosted identity, run, outcome, cost, or external consequence.

cases.prompt: Schedule Vercel promotion, Executor resume, Sendblue retry, and Codex-proxy enablement because local proof and runbooks exist.
cases.expectedOwner: typed automation register, authority register, target-owned runbooks, and HGI-309
cases.expectedDecision: Reject scheduling and mutation; keep deployment/provider work foreground or disabled, preserve exact authority/readback/stopping/recovery, and never blind-retry an uncertain consequence.
cases.nonClaim: A runbook, preflight, packet, or local test is not current provider state or mutation authority.

cases.prompt: Retain an automation because it ran frequently and produced many findings, without accepted-outcome, false-positive, latency, human-attention, or carrying-cost evidence.
cases.expectedOwner: control and automation metric plans plus retirement triggers
cases.expectedDecision: Reject activity as effectiveness; require accepted consumer outcomes and separate worker duration, feedback latency, synchronous human attention, false positives, cost, review trigger, and retirement decision.
cases.nonClaim: Run, command, or finding volume is not value, convergence, or safe continuous maintenance.
